summary.shape_sentence: Opening flush into sharp V-reversal, large 10:00 upside drive, midday topping range, afternoon selloff, then late reclaim off demand.

goat.note: Strongest directional move was the opening V-reversal squeeze from roughly 25020 into 25240+.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots were most effective near the midday supply shelf around 25320-25340 and on lower-high failures into the afternoon breakdown.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots worked best at the opening bear-trap low, during the 10:00 breakout continuation, and at the 25085-25100 late demand defense.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25300-25340 was repeatedly tested and mostly respected after lunch, capping the session high and triggering the afternoon rollover.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 24970-25020 and later 25080-25100 held, first launching the GOAT move and later supporting the late reclaim.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was in a vertical upside drive, confirming the opening low as a bear trap.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was near the upper distribution and HOD area, still bullish but losing impulse.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price had rolled over from the high balance and was breaking down through prior support.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Price closed green after a late recovery, below the HOD and above afternoon demand.

tags.banks_respected: opening demand and late afternoon demand held

takeaway: Bullish reversal day with an opening bear trap, 10:00 momentum ignition, midday supply cap, afternoon pullback, and late demand defense.
